title: South Africa proposes crypto tax rules under existing tax framework
summary: South Africa’s tax authority proposed draft guidance clarifying how crypto assets are taxed under existing income and capital gains tax rules, seeking public input until Aug. 31.

title: Binance outflows triple to $1.2B as ETH withdrawals hit 3-year high
summary: Binance recorded $1.23 billion in weekly net outflows, up 207% from the previous week, as Ethereum withdrawals surged to a three-year high.

title: Iran War Looms Over NATO Summit
summary: President Trump heads to Turkey this week, where NATO leaders will hold a crucial meeting. title: OPEC+ Ratifies Planned Oil Quota Hike as Gulf Flows Rebound
summary: Major OPEC+ members agreed another modest increase to their collective oil-production quotas for next month, adding to the prospect of more supply eventually hitting the market if a US-Iran peace pact can stick.

title: Bitcoin to $53K? Exchange Deposits Jump as Analysts Warn of Increased Volatility
summary: Bitcoin bounced back above $60,000 this week, but increased volatility might be on the way as crypto deposits to exchanges spike.

title: Perplexity Co-Founder: AI Safety Is an Excuse to Lock Down Frontier
summary: Andy Konwinski used Anthropic's Fable 5 debacle as exhibit A in the case against letting a handful of private labs govern who gets to do AI research.

title: Bitcoin ETFs log record eighth straight negative week despite large Thursday inflow
summary: Hyperliquid ETFs took in $4.3 million, their smallest week since launching in May, down from a record $111 million the week before.

title: Nearly 1 million wallets are down $3.81 billion on Trump’s memecoin: report
summary: Trump's annual financial disclosure showed a $636 million payout tied to the token and more than $1.4 billion in total crypto-related income for 2025.

title: Ukraine striking Russian energy infrastructure at unprecedented rate
summary: Kyiv’s intensified drone campaign is spurring Russia’s worst fuel crisis in decades

title: How Bending Spoons built a $23bn tech empire from struggling brands
summary: Nasdaq listing caps more than a decade of deals that transformed an Italian start-up into a global internet company
